repositories.name: gateway-service
repositories.notes: API gateway, JWT propagation, rate limiting and circuit breaking.

repositories.name: common-service
repositories.notes: Shared library consumed by all Java services.

repositories.name: chat-service
repositories.notes: Conversation orchestration, LLM calls and usage events.

repositories.name: organization-service
repositories.notes: Extracted from legacy backend. Billing and admin code were not copied.

repositories.name: platform-service
repositories.notes: Standalone extraction of the current backend module, including organization, billing and admin.

repositories.name: frontend
repositories.notes: Standalone web app. Defaults to gateway URL via NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE.
